recommendations.title: Leaving Las Vegas
recommendations.overview: Ben Sanderson, an alcoholic Hollywood screenwriter who lost everything because of his drinking, arrives in Las Vegas to drink himself to death. There, he meets and forms an uneasy friendship and non-interference pact with prostitute Sera.

recommendations.title: Cold Creek Manor

recommendations.title: One Night Stand

recommendations.title: Internal Affairs

recommendations.title: Match Point
recommendations.overview: Chris, a former tennis pro, takes a job as an instructor and befriends his wealthy young student, Tom. After being introduced to his family, Chris is soon engaged to Tom's sister, Chloe. Despite the professional and financial advantages that this rel

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Lucca's World
recommendations.overview: Determined to help her son, who has cerebral palsy, Bárbara takes her family to India for an experimental treatment.

recommendations.title: Pumping Iron
recommendations.overview: Amateur and professional bodybuilders prepare for the 1975 Mr. Olympia and Mr. Universe contests as five-time champion Arnold Schwarzenegger defends his Mr. Olympia title against Serge Nubret and the shy young Lou Ferrigno.

recommendations.title: This Boy's Life

recommendations.title: Sylvia
recommendations.overview: Story of the relationship between the poets Ted Hughes and Sylvia Plath.
